events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need identify component/condition: production welding, spatter/cleanliness reject, rough-complete. Condition installed-defective. Decision fail because non-compliant reject. Risk? Spatter/cleanliness reject is aesthetic/quality, maybe medium? Could cause coating failure, corrosion. In production quality gate reject. Risk medium. Work_stage rough-complete. percent_complete maybe 80? value 0. sound_source etc default empty string? Schema says string. event_time 0.0, rate 0.0, order empty list, workable empty list. findings: excessive weld spatter, lack of post-weld cleaning, surface contamination. actions: remove spatter/slag, clean weld and adjacent base metal, re-inspect per WPS/AWS, retrain operator/requalify if recurrent. rationale. references AWS D1.1/D1.3, shop WPS. Need ensure JSON valid.

events.label: response
events.text:
{

  "event_time": 0.0,

  "findings": [
    "Excessive weld spatter on and around the weld joint",
    "Inadequate post-weld cleaning leaving slag, spatter, and surface contamination",
    "Cleanliness does not meet shop WPS / AWS acceptance criteria"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove all weld spatter, slag, and surface contamination from the weld and adjacent base metal",
    "Clean the joint to the surface condition required by the shop WPS",
    "Re-inspect the weld for spatter, profile, and discontinuities per AWS D1.1/D1.3 and the WPS",
    "Address root cause (parameters, technique, consumables, shielding gas) and retrain operator if recurring"
  ],
  "rationale": "The weld is roughed in but rejected at the quality gate for spatter and cleanliness, which violates typical AWS D1.1/D1.3 acceptance criteria and the shop WPS. It must be cleaned and re-inspected before close-out.",
  "references": [
    "AWS D1.1/D1.3",
    "shop WPS"
  ]
}
